raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "src/components/ui/AdaptiveLayout.jsx", "issue": "Mid and Low UI modes fail to fully deactivate non-essential components, violating Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) and Law 5 (One Primary Action). Add end-to-end test for all three modes."}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "Law 2 non-compliance undermines ADHD safety core to VOLAURA's identity.", "next_files_to_read": ["apps/web/src/components/ui/AdaptiveLayout.jsx", "apps/web/src/hooks/use-energy-mode.ts"]}

findings.issue: Mid and Low UI modes fail to fully deactivate non-essential components, violating Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) and Law 5 (One Primary Action). Sub-agent findings confirm broken state transitions and blank fallbacks in Low mode.
findings.recommended_fix: Rewrite AdaptiveLayout state machine to enforce mode-specific component visibility. Implement verified fallbacks for all widgets in Low mode. Add end-to-end test for all three modes.

whistleblower_flag: Law 2 non-compliance undermines ADHD safety core to VOLAURA's identity.
